name: dealer.groups
query: SELECT id, level, group_id, make_id, name, email, display_name, description, is_internal, is_subsidiary, country_id, province_id, city_id, location_text, address, business_letter_address, postal_code, size_of_showroom, company_registration_number, sst_registration_number, business_registration_number, tax_identification_number, contact_person, contact_number, display_bid_count, preference, whitelist, auction_meta, location_coordinates, social_data, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, relation_manager_id, working_hours, membership_tier_id FROM `groups`;
